# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Skills

Before starting any task, check `.agents/skills/` for a relevant skill and follow it if one exists.

Available skill directories:
- `.agents/skills/eds/` — EDS/AEM block development, testing, research, authoring, and more
- `.agents/skills/collab/` — Collaboration workflows

Key EDS skills:
| Skill | Path |
|-------|------|
| Block Development | `.agents/skills/eds/block-development/SKILL.md` |
| Block Research | `.agents/skills/eds/block-research/SKILL.md` |
| Block Testing | `.agents/skills/eds/block-testing/SKILL.md` |
| Block README | `.agents/skills/eds/block-readme/SKILL.md` |
| Authoring Guide | `.agents/skills/eds/authoring-guide/SKILL.md` |
| E2E Testing | `.agents/skills/eds/e2e-testing/SKILL.md` |
| Site Spinup | `.agents/skills/eds/site-spinup/SKILL.md` |
| Pre-Merge Check | `.agents/skills/eds/pre-merge-check/SKILL.md` |
| Quality Audit | `.agents/skills/eds/quality-audit/SKILL.md` |
| Figma Map | `.agents/skills/eds/figma-map/SKILL.md` |

If a matching skill exists, read it fully before proceeding.
